## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on content strategy and workflows between Pixis and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pixis aims to become a go-to resource for marketers on leveraging AI, with a broad content vision spanning performance, creative, and general marketing topics](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX will focus on SEO-driven content, complementing other content workstreams (e.g. Beam's benchmark reports)](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Next steps include GrowthX team getting access to key tools (CMS, GA, Search Console) and developing initial content strategy/topics for review](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New Pixis website launching end of March - opportunity to design optimal content organization](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Pixis Content Vision and Strategy

  - [Broad goal to become trusted resource for marketers on AI usage across all functions](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Content to span performance, creative, and general marketing topics](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Potential "Authentically Intelligent" sub-brand for content](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Mix of content types: SEO-focused, high-value research, entertaining (podcasts, interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Primary audience: Performance marketing teams and marketing leaders in consumer/D2C brands](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [New gen AI product (Ad Room) launching - opportunity for related content](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)

### GrowthX Role and Approach

  - [Focus on SEO-driven content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Will develop programmatic and editorial content workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Aim to complement other content efforts (e.g. Beam's benchmark reports)](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Will provide recommendations on content organization for new website](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Process includes initial strategy/topic development, then calibration articles for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Current Pixis Content Situation

  - [Limited existing marketing-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2322.0)
  - [98% of current traffic from homepage/branded searches](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2338.0)
  - [Decent backlink profile but significant room for organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Moving from WordPress to new CMS (likely Craft or Webflow) with website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)

### Next Steps and Logistics

  - [GrowthX team to get access to CMS, GA, Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2689.0)
  - [Pixis to provide brand guidelines, ICP docs, competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Next week: 1-hour strategy session to review initial content OS and topic recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2891.0)
  - [Ongoing 30-minute check-ins after that](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2927.0)
  - [Action items and key points to be highlighted clearly for Jason's review](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=3064.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pixis team to review and provide feedback on GrowthX's company brief document](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=3110.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up via Slack with specific action items and access needs](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Schedule CMS walkthrough for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Pixis to share list of direct product competitors](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Next meeting: 1-hour strategy session to review initial content recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/UyiXVKXKo_bAxM--Fj5vbFAsWVxNgish?tab=summary&timestamp=2891.0)
